title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Nestle India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Nestle India
jsonLd.description:
Nestle India has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Nestle India:
Nestle India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nestle India!
